name: vscode-kolm-rag
description: Passive suggestion-acceptance monitoring, repetition-cluster detection, and local distill-routing controls for VS Code.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Kolm RAG observes accepted editor text and requires a trusted workspace.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Kolm RAG shells out to the local kolm CLI and requires a local workspace.

kolm.cluster.threshold.description: Minimum cluster count before the status-bar distill action becomes available.

kolm.teacher.preference.description: Preferred teacher model for distill jobs. Use auto to let the kolm runtime choose.

kolm.namespace.description: Namespace used for captures and downstream distill artifacts.

kolm.routing.enabled.description: After a distill job completes, route matching completion requests to the local student.

kolm.routing.jaccardThreshold.description: Jaccard similarity required against cluster fingerprints before routing to the local student.

kolm.passiveMonitor.enabled.description: Watch document changes for large-block insertions that look like accepted suggestions.

kolm.passiveMonitor.minBlockChars.description: Minimum inserted-block size in characters for the passive monitor to treat a change as an accepted suggestion.
